problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to in, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
